NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100150384) FILED BY ATTORNEY HAVERKORN, RACHEL

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO HAVE TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED IS DENIED. AFTER THE MOTION WAS FILED AND PRIOR TO THIS HEARING, PLAINTIFF FILED VERIFIED RESPONSES TO EACH REQUEST FOR ADMISSION STATING THAT SHE COULD NEITHER ADMIT OR DENY WITH AN EXPLANATION FOR HER RESPONSE. TO THE EXTENT THAT SHE MAY HAVE INCLUDED OBJECTIONS IN HER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS NOS 7, 8 & 9, SUCH OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. SEE TOBIN V. ORIS (1992) 3 CAL,APP, 4TH 814, 827 ET. SEQ. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 VIA EMAIL TO RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Set For Trial On Apr-25-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO HAVE TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED IS DENIED. AFTER THE MOTION WAS FILED AND PRIOR TO THIS HEARING, PLAINTIFF FILED VERIFIED RESPONSES TO EACH REQUEST FOR ADMISSION STATING THAT SHE COULD NEITHER ADMIT OR DENY WITH AN EXPLANATION FOR HER RESPONSE. TO THE EXTENT THAT SHE MAY HAVE INCLUDED OBJECTIONS IN HER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS NOS 7, 8 & 9, SUCH OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. SEE TOBIN V. ORIS (1992) 3 CAL,APP, 4TH 814, 827 ET. SEQ.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Continued To Apr-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
